title: Evaluation Hash Table
text: Home * Evaluation * Evaluation Hash Table An Evaluation Hash Table may be used in a similar fashion as the transposition table , that is using Zobrist- or BCH-hashing , to cache various computational expensive positional evaluation scores and flags. Despite the fact that the transposition table entries may contain evaluation scores as well, a tighter, dedicated evaluation hash table with its own replacement policy may gain a considerable amount of additional hits.
